EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Continued To Apr-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rudolph Vasquez for and with Netsai Supalerdsanong (Decedent's Wife). Virginia Palmer for James Palank (Decedent's Brother). Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

The Court questioned if the Medical Examiner has released the note. Mr. Vasquez stated that the Medical Examiner's office is not ready to release the note. Ms. Palmer stated that appointment of Special Administrator is needed. Mr. Vasquez argued that his client should be appointed to handle this simple estate. Ms. Palmer argued that her client contested the wife's interest in the estate. Mr. Vasquez stated his intention to file the holographic will and petition for letters of administration with will annexed. The Court agrees to appoint Debra Dolch as the Special Administrator with general powers until further order of court. Ms. Rasch will file the petition for appointment of special administrator. The two competing petition for letter of administration are continued to April 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
